## Summary

- What was changed?
- Why was it changed?

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests / CI

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran tests locally (`pytest -q`)
- [ ] I updated documentation (if needed)
- [ ] I added/updated tests for behavior changes
- [ ] I did not include local artifacts (`*.joblib`, generated reports, caches)
